title: tutorial-content
description: Schema for validating tutorial markdown content files (e.g., en.md, fr.md)

name.description: Tutorial title/name displayed as the main heading

description.description: Brief description of what the tutorial covers, used for SEO and previews

content_rules.description: Structural requirements for tutorial markdown content following YAML front-matter

cover_image.description: Cover image MUST appear within the first 10 lines after YAML front-matter closing '---'.
cover_image.alt_text: Any text is allowed as alt text

video_embeds.description: Optional video embeds using YouTube URLs

h1.reason: Title comes from YAML 'name' field, do NOT use H1 in content
h1.exception: H1 headings inside code blocks (fenced with ``` or ~~~, or indented) are allowed and not validated

h2.description: Main chapters - appears in sidebar navigation

unordered.description: Use dash (-) for unordered lists, NEVER asterisk (*)
unordered.reason: Asterisk conflicts with translation systems and bold formatting

ordered.description: Use numbered format for ordered lists

notes.description: Emphasized callout notes using bold prefix

internal_links.description: Links to other PlanB Network content
internal_links.format: Must be on their own line with empty lines before and after

cover.position: Must appear within first 10 lines after front-matter

language_specific.description: Screenshots with text that needs translation

universal.description: Images without text, shared across all languages

alt_text.description: All images should have descriptive alt text

yaml_front_matter.description: YAML front-matter block at the start of the file
yaml_front_matter.example:
---
name: Tutorial Name
description: Tutorial description
---
